issue_description: The cable is broken; the wire rope needs to be replaced.
The 30kg dumbbell locking plate is completely broken.
The motor is making noise; it needs lubrication.
The weight remains in place and does not return to its original position.
The belt is slipping slightly; the bolts need to be tightened.
The seat is damaged and the cover needs replacing.
The counterweight requires adjusting the track.
The pedal is loose; the screw needs tightening.
The handle is worn out and needs to be re-wrapped.
Worn-out ball bearings are making noise.
Some items are underweight; we need to order more.
The display screen is not turning on.
The power cord is damaged and needs replacing.
